sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36999" key="e)/caulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔξαυλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n36999.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">piped away, worn out,</tr_> of a flute, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.73</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
